grading_justification: Original packaging is unsealed, but headphones and charging case are free of blemishes and all silicone tips are present.
routing_reasoning: High resale velocity item in near-perfect condition. Refurbishing unlocks maximum value recovery over liquidation.

grading_justification: The box returned contained a cheap, knock-off generic brand wired headphone instead of the genuine Sony item.
routing_reasoning: Flagged as an invalid return / return fraud swap. Prevented auto-refund, saving $399 loss. Item sent to physical evidence/recycle hold.

grading_justification: Tags are detached and faint dust mark noted on the left sleeve cuff, fabric integrity is completely intact.
routing_reasoning: Perfect fit for an Amazon Warehouse open-box listing. Item requires minimal wipe-down prep before restocking.
